testcase.name: test_register_new_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_verification.py:177: in test_register_new_user assert data["user"]["email"] == email ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'user'

testcase.name: test_list_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'keys': [{'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:42:20', 'description': '', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:42:19', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:41:47', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:41:47', 'description': '', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:30:28', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:30:28', 'description': '', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_verification.py:204: in test_list_keys assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'keys': [{'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:42:20', 'description': '', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:42:19', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:41:47', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:41:47', 'description': '', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:30:28', 'description': 'test', ...}, {'calls_today': 0, 'calls_total': 0, 'created_at': '2026-06-13 09:30:28', 'description': '', ...}, ...]}, list)
